title: Enlighten Yourself
post_text: Calling somebody else fat won't make you any skinnier. Calling someone stupid doesn't make you any smarter. And ruining Regina George's life definitely didn't make me any happier. All you can do in life is try to solve the problem in front of you.

title: Sorry
post_text: Gretchen, I'm sorry I laughed at you that time you got diarrhea at Barnes & Nobles.

title: Observation
post_text: You know who's looking fine tonight? Seth Mosakowski.

title: Sex Ed
post_text: Don't have sex, because you will get pregnant and die! Don't have sex in the missionary position, don't have sex standing up, just don't do it, OK, promise? OK, now everybody take some rubbers.

title: Hi
post_text: I'm new. I just moved here from Africa.

title: I Wish
post_text: I wish we could all get along like we used to in middle school... I wish I could bake a cake filled with rainbows and smiles and everyone would eat and be happy...

title: Caesar
post_text: Why should Caesar just get to stomp around like a giant while the rest of us try not to get smushed under his big feet? Brutus is just as cute as Caesar, right? Brutus is just as smart as Caesar, people totally like Brutus just as much as they like Caesar, and when did it become okay for one person to be the boss of everybody because that's not what Rome is about! We should totally just STAB CAESAR!

title: Cliques
post_text: You got your freshmen, ROTC guys, preps, J.V. jocks, Asian nerds, Cool Asians, Varsity jocks, Unfriendly black hotties, Girls who eat their feelings, Girls who don't eat anything, Desperate wannabes, Burnouts, Sexually active band geeks, the greatest people you will ever meet, and the worst. Beware of Plastics.

title: Pink Wednesdays
post_text: On Wednesdays we wear pink.

title: Get In Loser
post_text: Get in loser, we're going shopping.

title: Cool Mom
post_text: I'm not like a regular mom, I'm a cool mom. Right, Regina?

title: Obsessed
post_text: Why are you so obsessed with me?

title: The Hot Dog Incident
post_text: I was just really hungry that day, okay? You try walking a mile in my shoes before you judge me.

title: Half A Virgin
post_text: I gave him everything. I was half a virgin when I met him.

title: Four For You Glen Coco
post_text: And none for Gretchen Wieners, bye! Four for you, Glen Coco! You go, Glen Coco!

title: Full of Secrets
post_text: That's why her hair is so big. It's full of secrets.

title: You Can't Sit With Us
post_text: You can't sit with us!

title: I'm A Mouse, Duh
post_text: I'm a mouse. Duh.

title: Is Butter A Carb
post_text: Is butter a carb?

title: Cheese Fries
post_text: Whatever, I'm getting cheese fries.

title: ESPN
post_text: I have a fifth sense. It's like I have ESPN or something. My breasts can always tell when it's going to rain. Well... they can tell when it's raining.

title: October 3rd
post_text: On October 3rd, he asked me what day it was. I said, 'It's October 3rd.'

title: Fabulous But Evil
post_text: She's fabulous, but she's evil.

title: Rules of Feminism
post_text: Irregardless, ex-boyfriends are just off limits to friends. I mean that's just like the rules of feminism.

title: Word Vomit
post_text: I had word vomit. You know, the truth just... comes out. I can't stop it.

title: I Want My Pink Shirt Back
post_text: I want my pink shirt back! I want my pink shirt back!

title: These Sweatpants
post_text: These sweatpants are all that fit me right now.

title: That Skirt
post_text: Oh my God, I love your skirt! Where did you get it? That is the ugliest effing skirt I've ever seen.

title: Social Suicide
post_text: Social suicide. You simply cannot hang out with those girls and expect anyone to take you seriously.

title: Kevin G Raps
post_text: Yo, yo, yo! All you suckas step aside! Kevin Gnapoor's gonna school you in a mathlete drive! Yo, I'm a mathlete and I'm here to say — limits, derivatives, pi all day!

title: Two Kinds of Evil
post_text: There are two kinds of evil people in this world. Those who do evil stuff and those who see evil stuff being done and don't try to stop it.

title: Africa
post_text: In Africa, you could die if you didn't follow the rules. You had to know what you were doing or the lion would eat you. North Shore is sort of the same.

title: Taco Bell
post_text: You wanna do something fun? You wanna go to Taco Bell?

title: Grool
post_text: I meant to say cool and then I started to say great and it came out... grool.

title: Jealous of Me
post_text: I'm sorry people are so jealous of me. But I can't help it that I'm popular.

title: The Spring Fling Speech
post_text: I know it may look like I've been going crazy or whatever, but I promise I'm not. I just want you all to know that none of this would have happened if I hadn't gone to this school.

title: Fine As Hell
post_text: I'm a mathlete. And I happen to think Cady Heron is fine as hell. Just wanted to put that out there.

title: Grading on a Curve
post_text: If any of you are directly involved in any way, you will not be able to sit with us at lunch. I will make it my personal mission to ruin your life.
